name: Stiger
description:
Damn, Halloween is near already? Well shit I guess it's time to release this shithead.Yeah this probably like the only Halloween related bot I could make, I didn't have any other good ideas.

This also an update to my old stiger bot that is kinda shit now, if there is any problems with this one, please tell me. I totally will read them.

Anyway this shithead is bisexual btw.

Update: just updating the scenario, nothing to see here.
